description: Minimum real production artifacts required to execute Phase 2E.5A (2025 blind-validation input readiness) through Phase 2E completion. This registry is consumed by scripts/dev_data_bundle/colab_package_dev_data_bundle.py to know exactly which files to read, validate, and stage from /content/drive/MyDrive/Project_Atlas. It contains no fabricated data: every 'known_*' field below is copied verbatim from the authoritative, already-committed schema catalog under atlas_reference/schemas/ (produced by a real scan of production Drive files). Artifacts whose 2025 path could not be confirmed against that catalog are marked catalog_status = 'path_unconfirmed_requires_colab_verification' and carry no known_* values; the packaging script must re-derive and re-measure every value directly from the live file at packaging time regardless of catalog_status, and must fail rather than substitute a guess when a file is missing.
execution_order_note: Artifacts are listed in the dependency order required to construct and validate the Phase 2E.5A 2025 canonical core evidence matrix, per docs/AUTOPILOT_EXECUTION_LEDGER.md and atlas/pregame/canonical_core_evidence_matrix.py.

artifacts.purpose: Governed raw bullpen pregame facts; one of the three core sources joined by atlas/pregame/canonical_core_evidence_matrix.py at game_pk+team grain.
artifacts.notes: known_size_bytes is source_size_mb (0.6109) from the schema catalog rounded to bytes; the packaging script must re-measure the exact byte size, not trust this value, since the catalog date (2026-07-18) may precede the packaging run.

artifacts.purpose: Per-batter pregame snapshot facts consumed by atlas/interactions/lineup_starter_input_engine.py to build the governed lineup-starter interaction facts (a core evidence-matrix source).
artifacts.notes: primary_key uses player_id, never player_name, per governance rule 7. Must be re-measured at packaging time.

artifacts.purpose: Per-pitcher pregame snapshot facts consumed by atlas/interactions/lineup_starter_input_engine.py to build the governed lineup-starter interaction facts (a core evidence-matrix source).
artifacts.notes: Must be re-measured at packaging time.

artifacts.purpose: Historical starting lineup facts required as an input by atlas/interactions/lineup_starter_input_engine.py (HISTORICAL_LINEUP_PATH). Not partitioned by season.
artifacts.notes: No entry for this path exists in atlas_reference/schemas/ as of the based_on_repository_commit. The packaging script must confirm this file exists on Drive and measure it directly; do not assume it is current for the 2025 season.

artifacts.purpose: Anomaly registry required as an input by atlas/interactions/lineup_starter_input_engine.py (ANOMALY_REGISTRY_PATH).
artifacts.notes: No entry for this path exists in atlas_reference/schemas/ as of the based_on_repository_commit. The packaging script must confirm this file exists on Drive and measure it directly.

artifacts.purpose: Governed lineup-starter interaction facts; one of the three core sources joined by atlas/pregame/canonical_core_evidence_matrix.py. This is the OUTPUT_PATH built by atlas/interactions/lineup_starter_input_engine.py from the two pregame-snapshot artifacts, historical_starting_lineups, and game_anomaly_registry above.
artifacts.notes: docs/ATLAS_BRAIN_PHASE_2E_5A_2025_VALIDATION_INPUT_READINESS.md cites a DIFFERENT candidate path for this same concept: data/game_intelligence/clean_starter_lineup_pregame/lineup_starter_inputs/2025/lineup_starter_inputs.parquet. Neither path is present in atlas_reference/schemas/. The packaging script must check both candidate_paths (see 'candidate_paths' below) against the live Drive tree, use whichever exists, and fail clearly (not silently pick one) if both exist with different content or neither exists.

artifacts.purpose: 2025 team-game identity timeline, the input to atlas/game_intelligence/pregame_identity_matchup_builder.py, which produces the identity-matchup facts consumed by the canonical core evidence matrix.
artifacts.notes: Only the 2024 discovery-season timeline is cataloged (atlas_reference/schemas/data__game_intelligence__pregame_team_identities__2024__pregame_team_identity_timeline.parquet.schema.json). No 2025 timeline is cataloged. If this file does not exist on Drive, atlas/game_intelligence/pregame_team_identity_timeline.py must be re-run for the 2025 season BEFORE packaging can include this artifact; the packaging script must not fabricate it.

artifacts.purpose: 2025 team-versus-opponent identity matchup facts; one of the three core sources joined by atlas/pregame/canonical_core_evidence_matrix.py.
artifacts.notes: Only the 2024 discovery-season matchup file is cataloged (atlas_reference/schemas/data__game_intelligence__pregame_identity_matchups__2024__pregame_identity_matchups.parquet.schema.json). Depends on pregame_team_identity_timeline_2025 above; must be built by atlas/game_intelligence/pregame_identity_matchup_builder.py if not already saved.

artifacts.purpose: Team-game outcome targets used by the Phase 2E.5A readiness/validation flow (TEAM_TARGET_PATH in atlas/validation/bullpen_concept_validation_2025.py). Not partitioned by season; the 2025 rows must be filtered by the atlas_season column.
artifacts.notes: Must be re-measured at packaging time.

artifacts.purpose: The frozen, immutable 2024 concept-discovery registry (2,138 concepts) that must be scored against 2025 evidence unchanged; governance forbids modifying frozen definitions during 2E.5A.
artifacts.notes: row_count (2138) matches the frozen-concept count cited in docs/ATLAS_BRAIN_PHASE_2E_5A_2025_VALIDATION_INPUT_READINESS.md. That document's cited SHA-256 for the 'registry' does not match known_sha256 here; this discrepancy is unresolved and must be re-checked against the live file, not assumed. Must be re-measured at packaging time.

artifacts.purpose: The frozen, immutable 2024 concept-member map (4,276 members) paired with frozen_concept_definition_registry_2024.
artifacts.notes: row_count (4276) matches the frozen-member count cited in docs/ATLAS_BRAIN_PHASE_2E_5A_2025_VALIDATION_INPUT_READINESS.md. Must be re-measured at packaging time.

artifacts.purpose: Frozen 2024 bullpen-specific concept registry consumed by atlas/validation/bullpen_concept_validation_2025.py and atlas/pregame/canonical_core_evidence_matrix.py callers when scoring bullpen concepts against 2025 evidence.
artifacts.notes: Must be re-measured at packaging time.

artifacts.purpose: Frozen 2024 bullpen-concept member map paired with bullpen_concept_registry_2024.
artifacts.notes: Must be re-measured at packaging time.
